description: ADAudit Plus is running at http://localhost:8081/ (login: admin/Admin@2024). Your organization has just deployed ADAudit Plus and you have been tasked with performing a complete enterprise security audit configuration and initial incident response. Identify the local user account with the highest number of failed logon attempts from the past 24 hours and investigate file access events in monitored audit folders to identify accounts that accessed sensitive files. Configure ADAudit Plus for ongoing monitoring by creating a technician account 'security_ops' (full name 'Security Operations', email 'secops@corp.local', password 'SecOps@2025', role 'Operator'), setting up an email notification profile with threshold-based alerting for any account exceeding 5 failed logons in 10 minutes, and scheduling a daily 'Security Summary' report. Document your findings in a comprehensive threat assessment report at C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\threat_assessment.txt, including the specific user accounts involved in suspicious activity, their threat classifications, and prioritized remediation steps.
